page.title: Gateway service
page.description: Make sure the Gateway service is installed and running before opening the Dashboard.

portConflict.title: Port conflict
portConflict.withPort: Gateway port {{port}} is already in use by another process.
portConflict.withoutPort: The target port is already in use by another process.
portConflict.suggestion: Free the port or choose an unused one, then start Gateway again.

nextStep.title: Next step
nextStep.description: If the local service is missing, ClawDesk will install or repair it before starting Gateway.
